examples: Since a workplace injury would disqualify an employee from such programs, some employees might be concealing injury, when it is feasible to do so.
The lack of a good education might disqualify you from some jobs.
Invigilators warn or disqualify test-takers whose eyes or hands wander in suspicious ways.
